de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext

Class URLDataLocation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.URLDataLocation
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DataLocation

    public class URLDataLocation
extends Object
implements DataLocation
    This class implements a data location, that describes an arbitrary URL. It is read-only and uses the URL's own stream for reading
    Since:
    2006-11-02
    Author:
    mulbrich
